_source: Truflation EV Commodity Index Methodology v1.41, October 2025 (research/ev_basket/methodology_v1.41.pdf, page 10-11). Each row is the quarterly rebalance starting on that ISO date. Weights are decimal percentages and sum to ~1.0 (rounding). Latest available row is 2025-10-01; v1.41 predates 2026-Q1/Q2 rebalances which are not in this document.
_units: dollar-share weight per metal in the chain-linked index (sums to 1.0)

_caveats.2026_quarters_missing: v1.41 PDF dated October 2025 — does not contain the 2026-01-01 or 2026-04-01 quarterly rebalances. For now: pin live calculation to 2025-10-01 weights and document drift risk in the WATCH block. Future v1.42+ PDF (if it appears in the public supabase bucket) may add 2026 weights.
_caveats.rebal_window: Methodology rebalances 'in the first 15 days of January, April, July and October to reflect the most current market conditions by using spot prices of commodities on the first day of each quarter (Jan 1st, Apr 1st, Jul 1st and Oct 1st).' So the weights shown for date D apply to dates >= D (until next quarter's row).
_caveats.base_normalization: Methodology states 'index calculation starts on January 1, 2018, offering a reference point.' Base normalization constant (e.g. index_2018-01-01 == 100? 1000?) is not stated explicitly — must be calibrated empirically from any one historical anchor (one settled KXTRUEV event suffices, or by reconstructing 2018-01-01 = 1000 convention and verifying).
